rationale: In the citing article, Dietvorst et al. (2009) appears once as a single illustrative example under the "understanding individual differences" application. The authors briefly note that the study combined fMRI and surveys to develop a salespeople mentalizing scale, but they do not build any specific theory, method, or empirical claim in this paper directly on that study. The citation functions as background evidence in a review-style list of examples rather than as a core intellectual dependency.
